reviews.comment:
Pasé a las 4 de la mañana. Le pedí cargar $20.000 de súper, en mí auto es casi medio tanque. Solo cargo un cuarto. Le reclamé. Solo me miró y se fué. Por la hora y lo riesgoso me fui. ESTAR ATENTOS.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped by at 4 a.m. I asked to fill up with $20,000 worth of super, which is almost half a tank in my car. I only had a quarter of a tank. I complained. He just looked at me and left. Because of the time and the risk, I left. BE CAREFUL.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNROVlEcHRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
No se si el combustible se lo proveen a todas las estaciones ypf-aca del mismo lugar pero en esta ypf la nafta infinia parece de shell, es realmente buena

(Translated by Google)
I don't know if fuel is supplied to all YPF stations from the same place, but at this YPF station, the Infinia gasoline seems like Shell. It's really good.

reviews.comment:
Compré una merienda en el Full, el lugar estaba impecable, me atendieron rápido aunque un poco parco el empleado, no me dijo ni "hola". Pero no afectó a la experiencia de compra

(Translated by Google)
I bought a snack at Full; the place was spotless, and the service was quick, although the employee was a bit curt—he didn't even say "hello." But it didn't affect the shopping experience.

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay mucha fila para cargar, las instalaciones son chicas para el lugar donde está ubicada. Y a los alrededores no hay otra estación de servicio YPF

(Translated by Google)
